contrast_link_integration.proposed_change: Remove inline styling and rely on CSS class with accessible color contrast
dependencies: Dark background colour #111827 defined in public/styles.css
Link text supplied via literal emoji + string
contrast_link_integration.impact: Improves WCAG 2.1 AA contrast without altering navigation structure

contrast_css_integration.proposed_change: Introduce container-level anchor styles (.container a, :hover, :focus-visible) using high-contrast palette and underline visibility
dependencies: Shared colour tokens for container backgrounds
Baseline link hover/focus expectations from tests/ui/home.spec.ts
contrast_css_integration.impact: Satisfies axe-core colour-contrast rule while keeping visual theme aligned

pause_immediacy_clarification_flow.proposed_change: Replace 1s visibility probe with shared helper that waits up to 5s, prefers answering clarifications when present, and ensures execution starts before Pause expectations
dependencies: Clarification controls defined in public/index.html markup
Playwright expect() calls gating pause button visibility
pause_immediacy_clarification_flow.impact: Prevents flake where clarifications remain unanswered and Pause button stays hidden

pause_resume_multicycle_clarification_fl.proposed_change: Insert clarification handling before loop using shared helper to answer/skip prompts so Pause controls become available consistently
dependencies: Same clarification DOM as pause-immediacy test
Resume drawer selectors used later in loop
pause_resume_multicycle_clarification_fl.impact: Stabilises multiple pause/resume cycles across browsers where clarifications block execution start

clarification_helper_extension.proposed_change: Add reusable async function that drives clarification form (radio, text, skip) for UI specs, exposed for import in affected tests
dependencies: Playwright Page type (will require import see usage site)
clarification_helper_extension.impact: Reduces duplicated logic and keeps future specs consistent

visual_regression_snapshot_scope.current_state: Snapshots captured before orchestration UI tweaks; Playwright diffs ~2% pixels on latest runs
visual_regression_snapshot_scope.proposed_change: Regenerate baselines after manual verification of new UI to realign visual regression tests
dependencies: CI visual regression gating using stored PNGs
Updated UI from public/script.js orchestrator features
visual_regression_snapshot_scope.impact: Eliminates persistent false positives in visual regression stage

stack_compliance_check.notes: All upcoming edits stay within public/ and tests/ui, fully compliant with stack guardrails
